metadata.description: Kanbantic project management plugins for Claude Code

plugins.name: kanbantic-claude-plugin
plugins.description: v2.23.0 (KBT-E110, Workflow v3 lane-skill owners): orchestrator claims the Epic + creates the epic-integration branch (F581); review merges to the integration branch and only Epic-level merges to main (F583/F584); reviewer approves linked User Stories + Specifications (F587); multi-repo Epics use one integration branch + PR per repo (F588); README PhaseStatus fix (F582). v2.22.0 (KBT-F589/F585): lane-skills aligned to get_system_schema + proactive test-case recording. v2.21.0 (KBT-E099 — wireframe tooling for agents): one efficient fileset way + a Wireframe Subagent, and the single-content write methods removed. create_wireframe builds version 1 atomically from filesJson (1..N files; live in Kanbantic API v0.9.267); a new Wireframe Agent subagent (KBT-SAGN009) plus context-free scripts wireframe-upload.mjs (folder→fileset) and wireframe-edit.mjs (replace/delete a file → new version) keep file bytes OUT of the model context (KBT-RL161); ClaudeMd steering (KBT-CLMD001) points agents at the fileset way + the subagent. BREAKING (F-D): the MCP tool add_wireframe_version and create_wireframe.initialContent are removed (filesJson required); known-mcp-tools.json is re-synced and the filePath-proxy reroutes create_wireframe to filesJson. update_wireframe_version + add_wireframe_version_files remain. See RELEASE_NOTES_v2.21.0.md. v2.20.0 (KBT-F490 — wireframe-versie concurrency-guard): the three wireframe write-tools gain optional lineage params (baseVersionId/baseVersionNumber + variantLabel) and a non-blocking divergenceWarning response field (advisory-only, KBT-RL157), surfaced live via the tools/list proxy — known-mcp-tools.json unchanged (no new tool names). v2.13.0 (KBT-F470) completes app-scoped Version-CRUD on the plugin surface: adds /kanbantic-version-create (non-destructive wrapper around the app-scoped create_version) and /kanbantic-version-delete (mutating-confirm wrapper around the new delete_version tool, warning that delete cascades to the Version's associated issues — KBT-BD158), and re-syncs known-mcp-tools.json to add delete_version (4 legacy release-tools still excluded). v2.12.0 completes the version-aware track (KBT-E066 / F318-F320): release→Version rename across the lane-skills, known-mcp-tools.json curated to the live Version tools (12 in, 4 legacy release-tools out), lint Invariant 5 against stale release tokens, and two zero-dep hooks (locked-version-blocker on claim_issue + Stop version-summary). First Application self-released through the new Version-flow. KBT-E087 Agent-orchestratie & modelbeleid: /kanbantic-orchestrate sequencer skill (F436), launch-orchestrator script (F438), context-aware lane-skill gates for Cowork/no-repo (F447), and sync `model:` frontmatter for the new Subagent Model field (F437).
